items.name: Architecture Gray Areas are recorded before HLD
items.notes: Four AGAs recorded: module boundary, wave boundary, status model, validation boundary.

items.name: HLD covers problem, options, recommendation, traceability, flows, failures and Story slices
items.notes: HLD uses dedicated metadata-only statistical gate module and Wave A scope; MF-GAP-2 extended evaluation diagnostics, MF-GAP-4 regime split and MF-GAP-7 factor clustering/de-dup are explicitly deferred.

items.name: Core ADR decisions include recommendation, alternatives, impact and rollback
items.notes: ADR-CR151-001..004 cover module boundary, Wave A, status model and validation boundary.

items.name: Blueprint/domain/dependency indexes are available and HLD consumes existing FEAT-03/FEAT-14 boundaries
items.notes: Long-term HLD/ADR indexes were updated; domain/dependency existing FEAT-03/FEAT-14 boundaries remain applicable.

items.name: No runtime, credential, lake, NAS, provider, QMT, broker, trading, external framework or Git remote authorization is granted
items.notes: All CP3 artifacts state static/fixture/design-only boundary.

pending_human_decisions.question: Approve a dedicated metadata-only statistical gate contract module for CR151?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Use a dedicated module, tentatively engine.strategy_admission_statistical_gate, and let existing mature multifactor/admission modules consume refs and summaries.

pending_human_decisions.question: Approve Wave A only for CR151 and defer Wave B?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Keep CR151 Wave A to multiple testing, minimum robust statistics, walk-forward/OOS, PBO/DSR and aggregate statistical gate; defer capacity/impact, benchmark-relative reporting, PIT universe audit, MF-GAP-2 extended evaluation diagnostics, MF-GAP-4 regime-aware validation and MF-GAP-7 factor correlation clustering/de-duplication to follow-up / CR154.

pending_human_decisions.question: Approve PASS/FAIL/NEEDS_REVIEW/BLOCKED fail-closed gate model?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Use the four-state model so missing mandatory evidence is BLOCKED, threshold failure is FAIL, borderline evidence is NEEDS_REVIEW and complete passing evidence is PASS.

pending_human_decisions.question: Keep CR151 static/fixture-only with no runtime authorization?
pending_human_decisions.recommended_option: Keep all real lake, NAS, provider, QMT, runtime, simulation/live/trading, broker, credential, external framework, Git remote and catalog pointer operations not authorized.
